overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a neon-lit waterfront city street at night. The character passes palm trees, futuristic buildings, and digital billboards before stopping at a ramen food stand with cyan neon lighting, then turning around and walking back.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront intersection with pedestrian overpass

events.description: character begins walking forward along the sidewalk away from the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking away from the intersection along the waterfront sidewalk, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket standing near concrete barrier, talking on phone

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge with neon trim spanning the street in the distance
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the ground
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street along the waterfront
horizontal blue-white neon streetlight on a teal pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection at night, with a pedestrian overpass visible in the distance. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk past a man in an orange jacket, with palm trees lining the left side and modern glass buildings on the right. Neon streetlights illuminate the wet pavement as the character moves away from the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree lined waterfront boulevard with parked vehicles

events.description: passing the initial intersection area into the continuous waterfront promenade
passing a line of parked cars on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past parked cars and other pedestrians, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket bending down near a parked car on the sidewalk edge

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a continuous waterfront boulevard lined with palm trees on the left and modern glass buildings on the right. Parked cars line the edge of the sidewalk, and a large digital billboard becomes visible on the building ahead. The wet pavement reflects the neon streetlights as the character passes other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial waterfront with digital signage and food vendors

events.description: approaching the illuminated ramen food stand with prominent cyan neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the neon-lit food stand, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

entered.detail: outdoor food stall with bright cyan neon lighting, counter seating, and Japanese architectural elements

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the waterfront path as a ramen food stand with distinctive cyan neon lighting comes into view on the right. Large digital billboards illuminate the building facades, and palm trees recede into the distance on the left. The character approaches the food stand which features traditional Japanese lanterns and a glowing counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor ramen bar with counter seating under awning

events.description: character stops at the food stand counter and looks at the menu
character turns around 180 degrees and begins walking back toward the street

agents.ego_description: stopping at the ramen stand counter to look at the offerings, then turning around to walk back

entered.detail: round green metallic bar stools lined up at the food counter
traditional Japanese paper lanterns with glowing cyan neon and black Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the illuminated ramen food stand, examining the counter with its cyan neon lighting and traditional Japanese lanterns. Green bar stools line the counter under the shelter of the stand's awning. After a brief pause, the character turns around and begins walking back toward the street, leaving the stand behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit urban waterfront that transitions from a wide city intersection to the intimate glow of a street-side food stall. It begins at a futuristic crosswalk, moving past a pedestrian in an orange jacket and along a concrete sidewalk flanked by palm trees and glass buildings. As the character advances, the scene expands into a boulevard where wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights and a large digital billboard emerges on the horizon. The path then leads toward a ramen stand characterized by distinctive cyan lighting and traditional Japanese lanterns, which gradually dominate the frame as the character approaches the glowing counter. Finally, the camera lingers on the green bar stools under the stand's awning before the character turns around and begins walking back toward the city street.
